segments.text: Today is the 19th Sahasrara Day.
If you count, first one was on the day Sahastrara was opened
I'll have to tell You a story about this Sahasra Day
About which it has been decided long time back
before I incarnated
They had big meeting in The Heavens
All the thirty-five crores of gods, the deities were there present to decide what is
be done.
This was ultimate that we have to do for human beings – open their Sahastrara
To open up awareness through spirit and real knowledge of the Divine
to remove the darkness of ignorance
and it had be spontaneously
because,
It has work. The living force is God
Also ,it have been very quick
So all Gods requested
that now I the Adi Shakti
Has take the birth
They tried their best
they did whatever was possible
the saints were made by them
but very few, they incarnated and people made religions out of them which were
perverted
brought them bad name. No reality in those religions
These religions
Were money oriented or power-oriented
There was no divine force working
Actually it all anti-divine
How to now turn human beings away from these
superficial religions, these perverted paths of destruction.
How to tell them about all this established organizations?
For ages they have been ruling making money and power
It was a tremendous task had be done with great patience
And the law
It was a very delicate work also because they believed in those religions – innocent people, simple people.
To blast them that this is all nonsense! They are no religious…
…they're against the Incarnation and against All The Prophets
Against ALL THE SAINTS
That's why all the real saints had to suffer
Its'a powerful work which has been done
And thats Why Adi Shakti had take birth on This Earth
It had to be before the 6th of May, because 6th of May was a doomsday in that year.
So it has done on 5th may at the nick-of time and all decided beforehand
And every deity's job is allotted
To one them very efficient deities
Very obedient they knew Me
very well, completely dedicated and devoted.
They knew Me every...very-very well
Every end of My hair they know
I didn't have to teach them protocol
Love itself gives you protocol
but love that is Divine
it's not selfish love
It' snot the way we love my child
My husband, My country.
my clothes
It is the love which is divine
Which spreads from your heart
From Your Spirit
Like a light of knowledge
What tremendous task it was
So I said at Sahastrara
I had to be Mahamaya, I have something that people can't recognize Me easily.
But Deities? No! This Mahayana Maya has come on this earth
not the Adi Shakti in a purest form is too much
so she was covered with these Maha Maya
Now you see in 19 years what we've achieved
many yogis are sitting before. The difference between a saint and a yogi is that the saint
himself, he's righteous – himself is holy but He doesn't know much about the Kundalini
But the yogi knows about kundalini, but difference between a yogi and a sahaja yogini is that
Sahajyogi has powers.
And sahaja yogini have power to give realization for others – a yogi can cleanse himself
But he cannot cleanse others, while a Sahaja Yogi can cleanse others and cleanse himself.
So this is the superior most state which you achieved through your great punyads I should
say!
so many of have been searching for truth in previous lives
And now here are to achieve what we've been searching
All that has happened know so beautifully
You are not even aware what has happened to you, automatically, spontaneously have got
the powers within your central nervous system in a split of second.
Your attention is being fixed now – off course some people don't know and I see
that tension wobbles but so many achieve this state as he was saying, Shivoham, shivohum,
You are happy.
What Adi Shankaracharya has described about himself, you can say that to all of them – so
many Adishankaracharyas sitting before Me but still I am a Mahamaya!
I just behave like you,
i too have a family
and children which can be called as mine
And You are my Children to.
So when your matured enough
the first sign is that you get discretion
That's Divine Discretion
Is love again
But see people falter
They don't mind saying
Mother
Im catching on my Agnya
Why?
You know how to cleanse it, you know what do about it.
Why don't clean?
why dont'you get with
What is the thing?
Maya
First starts
The problem of family
My wife
my mother
brother
husband
children
All right
That's Maya
With that
you get dropped, again you are brought up.
Then subtler and settler this Maya becomes
the situation of family improves everybody knows that
but so many fight her
So may gets lost in Sahaja Yoga because they had a bad wife or
A Bad husband
You have to ascend alone yourself
We don't need depend on others
And those who do not allow you to ascend
have to be thrown away.
Nothing is more important than your ascent higher and higher
because it has a very great divine purpose,
the ultimate reclamex
where whole humanity's to saved through Your efforts
You've got working
And at this situation
you see that thousand petals
these are powers of Virata within you
And this is where we falter, that the light of the Sahastrara
Is The Brahmarandra which your heart chakra.
Now a Heart Chakra can be also misunderstood very much
and these misunderstandings always comes from the Mahamaya for testing
Like We have to say
We have to have a family, we must have good families.
We need to have good children.
Immediately the Ma Maya acts and you start worrying about
your husband or worry for his family
You should be in our family
There is saying in Sanskrit
The one who are of character of saints
The whole world is their family.
You worry about an individual family so that the collective
family is strengthened, not to worry
abut individual families
Sothat the collective suffers
and if there's such a family die better throw it away
you have too sacrifice
No sacrifice
It only getting rid of disease
So we waste our time with the children,
without family which is very small.
Then this situation changes in different areas
that's compassion and love and affection
We believe to have to love Sahaja Yoga
I asked somebody go away
because he had a disease
And He told me lies
So, a negative person's attention will go to him more and we try look after that person
more than other Sahaja Yogis.
Do you have compassion or love?
Why do get attracted by people who are out of Sahaj Yoga?
Why do you sympathize with people who are not here to help the downtrodden,
poor so-called suffering people?
No! You're no incarnations.
We aren't there for women who cry all time
and children who had been separated from their parents
It's a hospital that we are in.
We're getting cured, all of us!
Have you heard about patient going and helping other patients?
The doctors have to do the job
but Sahaja Yogis always
at beginning used fall prey
this kind an appeal
like bad apple
there were many good apples
How can they cure the bad apple?
Even if you put twenty thousand on top of that bad apple, it will spoil all others.
That's not your job!
It is the job God.
Only thing what can do
Is to pull
The person
In a collectivity showing
You are wrong
You're wrong
And have be alright
But these ideas
I don't know from where they have crawled
There nothing like evil in this world
There's nothing like bad in this world, there is even.
They raise something bad
and you can know if your vibrations are correct
or discretionary is correct to know immediately
so waste their energies in correcting people
who never be corrected
I'm forgetting that we have not corrected the person
on contrary You're corrupted
That means We've not yet matured enough
In breaking of the Sahastrara
I have never left anything undone. It's a perfect job!
Your nerves are not hurt, your brain is not hurt.
Such powerful Kundalini comes out
How sweetly beautifully delicately she pierces through
only the threat come up
and how then connection established
And relaxation starts coming in on sympathetic
See how all the beautifully chakras open and more of these threads coming out.
Now you are also told,
How to work it up?
You know all technical know-how
but what if don't that you're not yet a perfect machine
–you have to perfect yourself
Moreover there's a Mahamaya
She doesn' t take for granted
That is trouble
she puts you deliberately into temptations
Deliberately she gives you positions, now leaders, world-leaders, universe-leaders.
So we've developed first one tail then on horn
and something comes out of Sahastrara also – they look like a clown!
To test You She may marry to funny people as well
because testing has been done
that's the job for Mahamaya
She has to test you.
Gold, the diamond and all that is valuable
have been tested.
Without it how can we certify?
It's not like going into a church
somebody puts water on your head
now you are baptized
finished! Now you're chosen
The water will evaporate in no time
And when You go to God
He'll say
How were You baptized?
This Water
Where is it?
I can't see.
So all these things are to be understood in right perspective, they're for our ascent
,for out benevolence and higher state but you must know we have fix up our whole will
when people climb say Himalayas what do the do ? They take a big nail, nail at
a higher point, then tie up the rope and climb up to that.
They don't look down – they put another nail up there, climb up right into
That…and …that's how they climbed Himalaya!
Now what do we in Sahaja Yoga?
We take an nail from top, put it downward
First day when you get realization

The other way round. But as soon you get Realization, if

decide how should I fix up myself?

now

let me like my ascent more
this.

will not have.

i put you on top

I tell about everything,

anyone now out there great incarnations
did they know so much about Kundalini?

if has its very little
such an extent acts on your fingertips

The computer has to be workable and there where we have failed
And We fail every day. Sometimes it is disastrous
Horrible! Now 19 years
You've had this Shastra
An 18 year I worked
You have to now understand your responsibility.
We've got to emancipate the human beings
we don't want
do anything that is little out of their way

but you must celebrate today
because everybody has a Sunday holiday
according our conveniences
We have to work out everything, all right doesn't matter, it's permitted.

because there is a continuous supply of energy which you can also get.

eighteen years.
You know in western countries after eighteen year you are regarded as adults – no more
children!
You all have become now adults, what else?
All right.

really we are still big babies

if want to go heaven

with powers to fight

behave in such a manner

Om Tameva Sakshat Sri Indrago Papariksipta Smaratunabha Jhangikaye Namaha
Shri Guddhagul Payaya Namah
Solitations to her whose ankles are fleshy and rounded without any protrusion visible.
Aum Tomeva Sakshat Sri Guddha Gulbhaya Namaha, Shri Kurma Prastha Jayashnuprapadan Vithayanamah.
Salutations to her the arches of whose two feet are more shapely and convex than
the back of the tortoise.
Salutations to her,
The radiance whose toe nails completely suppress
the darkness of ignorance in the minds
of those who reverently bow down to her feet.
Salutations, the captivating radiance of whose feet throws into shade
with the beautiful lotus.
Aum Tomeva Sakshat Sri Padadvaya Prabha Jalaparakrita

Lotus feet are adorned

Salutation to the supremely adorable Treasury of Beauty.
Salutations for her who is red all over in respect
of her garment, ornament, flowers, complexion and the rest.

Salutations to Her whose each and every limb is faultless

Salutations to her who is adorned with all ornaments,
for ornaments that are not worthy of the deity
Are no ornament in reality
Om Tvame vasakshat Sri sarva barana bhushitaye namah
Sri shivaka mishvarankashtaye
Solitations to Shiva Kamasundari, who rose from the fire of pure Shiva
consciousness and sat in lap of Siva Kamesha. Who could take any form he
wished? And From whom The Will To Create Arose.
Om Tvam eva sakshat Sri Sivakameshwaran Kastaye Namaha Sri Shivaye
Salutations to the eternally auspicious supreme divinity, Shiva's counterpart his will power.
Aum Tvam eva sakshat Sri Sivaye namaham Sri Swadhinavallabhaya
Salutations her whose consort Sivakamesha is entirely her own
for very existence of transcendent a cosmic reality of Paramashiva
is known truth only to the world created by
The Power that Is One with Paramashiva.
Aum Tvam eva sakshasri svadhinah vallabhaye namaha

Salutations to her who resides in a grove of kadambar trees.

Salutations for her present at the centre of an ocean of Ambrosia

Salutations
To her grants, to her devotees

Kameshvarashiva himself a timeless

Om Tvam eva sakshat Sri Banda suravadodhukta shakti sena samanvitaye namah

Solitations for her who is served by
the elephant division of her army under the lead of Sampatkari.

Salutations to Her who is encircled by
The Division Of Her Army consisting
